channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: All signs have been sprayed on low traffic area, 5th June
item.description:
All signs have been sprayed over in a low traffic neighborhood. This street is only for permits and cycling. Believe they have been sprayed to invalidate any penalties for drivers not adhering

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barbauld Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Textiles recycling bank overflowing, 5th June
item.description:
Textiles recycling bank needs emptying. I have visited 4 times in last month and had to take donations away again because it's so full.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Carlton Parade, Ramsden, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, unlicensed, mould contamination warning, 5th June
item.description:
As above- abandoned & unlicensed car with mould warning, outside my house. 142 Domonic Drive

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Domonic Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please collect rubbish on street, 5th June
item.description:
Please collect

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chart Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken branch in tree canopy in danger of falling, 5th June
item.description:
There is a broken branch in the tree canopy and the broken part is resting across other branches so may fall. It is difficult to see in the picture so I have tried to highlight where it is broken.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodlands Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter in alleyway, 5th June
item.description:
Lots of litter in alley

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 5th June
item.description:

item.title: No 47, 5th June

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Goldhurst Terrace, South Hampstead, Greater London

item.title: Bridgehouse Meadows, rubbish, 5th June
item.description:

item.title: Dead squirrel on footpath, 5th June
item.description:
Dead squirrel is in the footpath which will be on the school run for many children
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Beaumont Road, Petts Wood, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 5th June
item.description:
There are plenty of rubbish along the footpath and river side including shopping troley.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park needs maintenance - overgrown weeds, grass and nettle, 5th June
item.description:
There was not grass cutting for weeks. Even before, some area went left 'wild' which was nice until the heatwave. Now, weeds are brown and unpleasant. Also, on the grass, there is a large patch of stinging nettles and since it's near primary school, kids can get stung. Also, burdock started to grow and this is very expansive and difficult to remove. Clearly, some maintenance is needed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salter Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping @ Bridgehouse Meadows, 5th June
item.description:
Far right stickers attached to the street lights at Bridgehouse Meadows, please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Myers Lane, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light litter but along the length of the footpath, 5th June
item.description:
As it is every week, residents have chosen to leave their household rubbish for the foxes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Trees overhanging pathway and road, 5th June
item.description:
The trees on the side of this road are overhanging both the pathway and the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Recreation Road, Longlands, Greater London

item.title: A Fly-tip Medium - 4 to 9 black bags problem has been found, 5th June

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: Small chest freezer and large bag off bamboo sticks blocking pathway for prams and wheelchairs. Outside Block 15 Cook Square., 5th June

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cook Square, Slade Green, Greater London

item.title: Black rubbish bag on the street outside 72 Friar Road, 5th June
item.description:
There is a ripped black bag of what looks like garden waste on the street. It has been there for weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Friar Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Sidcup station subway has a block drain, 5th June
item.description:
Sidcup station subway has a block drain, makes it hard for people with wheel chairs and buggies.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 183, Longlands Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
